descriptions.text:
hetja's quest is a roguelite-style romhack of FE8 made by D_H and RPG Club Games. it follows the story of hetja, a long dead being with sense of purpose so strong that they defy death itself in search of their dear old grandmother.
navigate an ever changing labyrinth, challenge and recruit strong foes, bolster your strengths with custom weapons and abilities, all to take on a great and powerful evil.
